1
Notifications

🚨 New Payment Method: PAPARA! 🚨

💥Last week was nothing short of epic! We kicked off by announcing that Inter and Borussia Dortmund are now part of the #BlockDAGTeam

👀 But guess what? We’re not slowing down—today, we’re back with another massive win!

📣 Breaking News: You can now purchase BDAG in the entire Turkey region using Papara, our newly added payment method!

September 02 at 5:00 PM

🔥 BlockDAG x Inter Milan PARTNERSHIP!

⚽ We’re Back at it! BlockDAG Partners with Italy’s Champ! 🥇

💥 After our Borussia Dortmund partnership we’re ready to announce that BlockDAG is now the official Premium Blockchain Partner of Inter Milan!

🤔 You thought we were done? WE’RE NOT! There’s a 3rd partnership coming VERY SOON 👀

August 30 at 1:00 PM

🚀 BlockDAG becomes Borussia Dortmund's Official Partner!

👑 BlockDAG, King of the Soccer Field: Historic $10M Partnership with BVB!

🎉 Today marks the biggest day in our history—BlockDAG Network is officially partnering with Borussia Dortmund, one of Europe’s most legendary football teams!

August 28 at 12:30 PM

🚨 ENTERING OUR TESTNET ERA: September, 20th! 📣

🛠️ Public Release: BlockDAG Explorer Testnet Environment

🗓️ Mark your calendars because, on September 20th, 2024, we’re launching the BlockDAG Testnet Blockchain and its powerful BlockDAG Explorer!

💥 The future is closer than ever, and we’re thrilled to have you with us on this journey.

August 27 at 6:00 PM

Dev Release 114 ! 📈

This week is shaping up to be one of our most thrilling yet, as we move closer to our testnet launch!

The testnet launch is a massive milestone for all of us, and we're working around the clock to ensure everything is perfect.

Check out your Dev Release 114 on your dashboard for more information ! 🚀

Yesterday 5:15 PM

Notifications

🚨 New Payment Method: PAPARA! 🚨

💥Last week was nothing short of epic! We kicked off by announcing that Inter and Borussia Dortmund are now part of the #BlockDAGTeam

👀 But guess what? We’re not slowing down—today, we’re back with another massive win!

📣 Breaking News: You can now purchase BDAG in the entire Turkey region using Papara, our newly added payment method!

September 02 at 5:00 PM

🔥 BlockDAG x Inter Milan PARTNERSHIP!

⚽ We’re Back at it! BlockDAG Partners with Italy’s Champ! 🥇

💥 After our Borussia Dortmund partnership we’re ready to announce that BlockDAG is now the official Premium Blockchain Partner of Inter Milan!

🤔 You thought we were done? WE’RE NOT! There’s a 3rd partnership coming VERY SOON 👀

August 30 at 1:00 PM

🚀 BlockDAG becomes Borussia Dortmund's Official Partner!

👑 BlockDAG, King of the Soccer Field: Historic $10M Partnership with BVB!

🎉 Today marks the biggest day in our history—BlockDAG Network is officially partnering with Borussia Dortmund, one of Europe’s most legendary football teams!

August 28 at 12:30 PM

🚨 ENTERING OUR TESTNET ERA: September, 20th! 📣

🛠️ Public Release: BlockDAG Explorer Testnet Environment

🗓️ Mark your calendars because, on September 20th, 2024, we’re launching the BlockDAG Testnet Blockchain and its powerful BlockDAG Explorer!

💥 The future is closer than ever, and we’re thrilled to have you with us on this journey.

August 27 at 6:00 PM

Dev Release 114 ! 📈

This week is shaping up to be one of our most thrilling yet, as we move closer to our testnet launch!

The testnet launch is a massive milestone for all of us, and we're working around the clock to ensure everything is perfect.

Check out your Dev Release 114 on your dashboard for more information ! 🚀
